name: Wong Wai Hang
title: AI Workflow & Prototype Builder
summary: Operations and education professional with 14+ years of stakeholder-facing experience, team coordination, and service delivery, now actively building practical capability in AI workflow design, no-code orchestration, and vibe coding. Hands-on experience in deploying web apps, exploring agent-style workflows, and turning real operational needs into testable digital prototypes.

experience.company: Legislative Council Secretariat 立法會秘書處

roles.title: Public Information Officer
points: Handled public-facing operations, procurement, souvenir development, promotions, reporting, and stakeholder coordination
Managed a 26-person frontline team supporting public services, tours, and reception
Worked on real operational issues including roster planning, manpower deployment, and service delivery

roles.title: Educator
points: Built strong communication and facilitation skills through teaching, student engagement, and activity coordination
Explained complex concepts in accessible ways for different audiences
Developed user-focused problem-solving habits that now inform workflow thinking and AI prototyping

education.institution: Hong Kong Academy for Performing Arts
education.degree: Master of Fine Arts (Drama and Theatre in Education)

education.institution: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

projects.name: Tradesizer
projects.description: A position sizing calculator designed to turn complex trading inputs into clear, usable outputs.
projects.workflow: Used AI assistance to generate core logic, suggest validation rules, and draft UI components, then refined, tested, and deployed the app.

projects.name: Candle Catcher
projects.description: A visual helper for identifying candle patterns with an emphasis on usability and responsive interface design.
projects.workflow: Used AI for layout ideas, code stubs, and visual direction, followed by manual refinement for responsiveness and clarity.

projects.name: Emoji Crowd Runner
projects.description: 3D crowd runner game with obstacle navigation, gate power-ups, and battle system. Built following a formal 12-day development roadmap.
projects.workflow: End-to-end game development demonstrating understanding of game mechanics, collision detection, particle effects, and deployment pipeline.

projects.name: Roster Management System
projects.description: An operations-focused prototype for roster coordination, designed around shift planning, leave handling, and manager usability.
projects.workflow: Inspired by real frontline team management experience, with emphasis on operational logic, process clarity, and practical adoption.

projects.name: Sick Leave Arrangement AI
projects.description: A domain-focused AI assistant exploring how a specialised LLM can support routine operational decision-making. Training FunctionGemma (mobile-optimized LLM) via Unsloth Studio for on-device staffing coordination.
projects.tech: Unsloth Studio, FunctionGemma, Mobile-oriented workflow thinking
projects.workflow: Exploring how a specialised assistant can support routine operational decision-making through targeted behaviour and workflow-aware responses.

projects.name: OpenWork + Telegram Workflow
projects.description: Practical daily workflow automation using OpenWork agent with Telegram integration. Demonstrates real-time agent interactions, task coordination, and multi-step workflows in a chat-based environment.
projects.workflow: Focused on prompt structure, task coordination, and making multi-step interactions more usable in practical scenarios. Currently supporting daily development and research tasks.

projects.name: LangChain / LangGraph Agent Profiles
projects.description: Experimenting with assigning different roles and responsibilities to different AI agents within a structured workflow.
projects.workflow: Learning how agent orchestration, role separation, state flow, and routing can be applied to practical task execution.

workingStyle.title: How I Build
steps: Understand user needs and operational pain points
Map task flow and decision points
Test for usability and practical value
Refine into a simpler, clearer workflow
